meta.issuer_cn: 宇树科技股份有限公司

company.name_cn: 宇树科技股份有限公司
company.headquarters: Building 1, No. 88 Dongliu Road, Xixing Street, Binjiang District, Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province

products.name: H1 Humanoid Robot
products.specs: First general-purpose humanoid robot released by Unitree in August 2023; series expanded to four models (excluding wheeled variants)

products.name: B Series Quadruped Robot
products.specs: Applied in scientific research, industrial inspection, emergency rescue, and intelligent services

products.name: Go Series Quadruped Robot
products.specs: Applied in scientific research, industrial inspection, emergency rescue, and intelligent services

products.name: Joint Module
products.specs: Core actuator component for robotic systems

products.name: Collaborative Robotic Arm
products.specs: Collaborative arm component for robotic systems

products.name: Perception Sensor
products.specs: Sensing component for robotic perception and interaction

products.name: Embodied Intelligence Model
products.specs: Proprietary embodied intelligence and motion control algorithms; includes reinforcement learning and high-precision control

key_risks: High R&D investment requirements characteristic of STAR Market companies, leading to greater financial pressure
High operational risk inherent in the general-purpose robotics industry, which is still in an early stage of rapid development
Unstable financial performance due to the technology-intensive and R&D-driven nature of the business
Elevated delisting risk associated with STAR Market listing standards
Risk that core technologies may not keep pace with rapid industry iteration, causing loss of competitive advantage
Risk of intensified market competition from both domestic and international robotics companies
Risk of talent loss in key areas such as AI, motion control, and perception interaction
Risk that new products (e.g., humanoid robots) may fail to achieve expected commercialization or market acceptance
Risk of supply chain disruption or dependency on key component suppliers
Overseas market risk, including geopolitical uncertainties and export control regulations affecting international sales
Risk that proceeds from the IPO may not be deployed as planned, or that funded projects may not achieve expected returns
Risk of intellectual property disputes or failure to adequately protect proprietary technologies

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Model Research and Development Project
projects.focus: Research and development of embodied intelligence AI models and algorithms for general-purpose robots

projects.name: Robot Body Research and Development Project
projects.focus: R&D of robot hardware bodies, including humanoid and quadruped robot platforms and core components

projects.name: New Intelligent Robot Product Development Project
projects.focus: Development of new types of intelligent robot products to enrich the product matrix

projects.name: Intelligent Robot Manufacturing Base Construction Project
projects.focus: Construction of a scaled, intelligent manufacturing facility to enhance productionization and industrialization capabilities
